skill.name: claude-scientific-skills
skill.summary: AI-powered scientific research assistant for literature review, methodology design, and data analysis
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged URLs in documentation as potential network risks, but these are reference links in markdown text, not executable network code. The skill contains only documentation with no executable scripts, external commands, or actual network operations. All findings are false positives.

content.value_statement: Researchers face overwhelming literature and complex data analysis challenges. This skill provides structured methodologies for literature review, experimental design, and statistical analysis to accelerate scientific discovery.
actual_capabilities: Design structured literature review workflows for systematic paper analysis
Generate hypotheses and experimental methodologies based on research questions
Assist with statistical analysis planning and data interpretation
Format research findings according to academic publication standards
Identify relevant research gaps and suggest future directions
Translate complex scientific concepts into clear explanations
limitations: Cannot access paywalled academic papers or proprietary databases
Does not perform actual statistical computations or run code
Cannot verify factual accuracy of cited research without source access
Recommendations should be validated by domain experts before implementation

use_cases.title: Graduate Student Literature Review
use_cases.description: Systematically analyze and synthesize academic papers for thesis research

use_cases.title: Research Proposal Development
use_cases.description: Structure research questions, hypotheses, and methodology sections for grant applications

use_cases.title: Data Analysis Planning
use_cases.description: Design appropriate statistical approaches and interpret analytical results

prompt_templates.title: Basic Literature Summary
prompt_templates.prompt: Summarize the key findings from this abstract and identify the main research contribution: [paste abstract]
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick understanding of a single paper

prompt_templates.title: Comparative Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare the methodologies used in these three papers on [topic]. What are the strengths and limitations of each approach?

prompt_templates.title: Research Gap Identification
prompt_templates.prompt: Based on this literature summary, what unanswered questions remain? Suggest three specific research directions that would advance this field.

prompt_templates.title: Statistical Analysis Planning
prompt_templates.prompt: I have a dataset with [describe variables and sample size]. My research question is [question]. What statistical tests are appropriate, and what assumptions must I verify?

output_examples.input: Analyze this abstract for key contributions and limitations
output_examples.output: A structured breakdown identifying the novel methodology, sample characteristics, main findings, and potential confounding factors

output_examples.input: Suggest improvements to this research design
output_examples.output: Numbered recommendations covering control variables, sample size considerations, and validity threats with supporting rationale

best_practices: Always verify AI-generated citations against original sources before publication
Use structured prompts with specific context about your research domain and constraints
Cross-reference statistical recommendations with domain-specific methodology literature
anti_patterns: Do not rely solely on AI for critical research decisions without expert validation
Avoid submitting AI-generated text without thorough review and proper attribution
Do not share unpublished data or confidential research information in prompts

faq.question: Can this skill access academic databases like PubMed or Web of Science?
faq.answer: No, the skill cannot access external databases. You must provide the paper content or abstracts you want analyzed.

faq.question: Is the output suitable for direct inclusion in academic publications?
faq.answer: Output should be used as a starting point and heavily revised. Always maintain your own voice and verify all claims.

faq.question: Can this skill perform statistical calculations?
faq.answer: No, it provides guidance on appropriate statistical methods but does not execute calculations. Use statistical software for actual analysis.

faq.question: How should I cite assistance from this skill in my research?
faq.answer: Follow your institution or journal guidelines. Generally, acknowledge AI assistance in methods or acknowledgments sections.

faq.question: Can this help with writing grant proposals?
faq.answer: Yes, it can help structure research aims, significance sections, and methodology descriptions for grant applications.

faq.question: What research domains does this skill support?
faq.answer: The skill provides general research methodology guidance applicable across sciences, but domain-specific expertise should supplement its recommendations.
